brief: As you walk through the museum, you are journeying through centuries of history, not  only of this beautiful city's treasured past, but also the first and sometimes forgotten  long-lost inhabitants of this part of the Colorado River area. Your tour will take you through several facets of the region's early and colorful years, the  different cultures and peoples who traverse this area, long before the London Bridge was here.

brief: The title of this painting La Celistina  refers to a character from Comedia de Calisto Imelevia. La Celistina is a portrait of an actual woman from Barcelona  whose name was Calote Vallevia and she was a neighborhood figure. In 1904 Pablo Ruiz Picasso is 23 years old and already  establishing himself as an artistic force. She's got a real  watchful almost cat-like sensibility as she sidles into the picture.
